nasb.text: When the king came from Damascus, the king saw the altar; then the king approached the altar and went up to it,

esv.text: And when the king came from Damascus, the king viewed the altar. Then the king drew near to the altar and went up on it

cnv.text: 王從大馬士革回來，看見了那祭壇，於是王走到祭壇旁邊，登上臺階，

ccb.text: 王从大马士革回来，看见那座坛，就到上面献祭。
